dataList.dlg: Kiddo, remember what Mama told you? You ever find anything you don't like, you can talk to me about it!

You free today, Princess? Wha? Watching Fixer clips...? Well, can't you tape 'em and watch 'em later?
Hm... We'll be playing "Kriegsspiel" today. Can you set the board up with miniatures and maps for Mama,
so we can get to it as soon as I return from executing Vengeance? Bwahahaha! That's my girl! Never says no to her Mama.

Frankly, I was dreading having to bother myself with homework after so long... But working on them with my princess isn't so bad. Should be able to wrap that up in a minute. 
Hm... Got the Fixer mag and comic books she asked for, got some fruits—that should help chase the sickies away. Heh, I can already see her bouncing with joy.

... Mama's still watching.
Ah, you wanna watch a live Fixer broadcast? Hm. Sure thing, as soon as Mama's done with this one, you can watch whatever you want. It only runs for an extra hour, that good with you?

Devious and craven? Guess she never once mentioned me, huh? Did you really expect the Middle to fight you one-on-one like the Cinq or something?
Bwahahaha! Sucks to be you, 'cuz I'm all for these chaotic, all-out brawls!

That one's a Ferrum Scrapus minifig. The legs have their own unique design, but yes, it still counts as part of the Iron Host series. ... Kiddo. We've been over this. Ferrum Meteoris may look like other Iron Host figs, and sure, people lump them in all the time, but they are absolutely, categorically not part of the series. *sigh* Put that one on the opposite shelf.

The South? Aren't they practically choking on Vengeances too tricky to deal with? Some of them even seem weighty enough to be classified as Labors. ... That incident must've left that part of the family without anyone capable enough to undertake the Pilgrimage of Loyalty... Hah. A sorry state of affairs, but what can I do? Time for the Great Sister to personally step up for the family.

Hmm... they have no physical evidence, nor did I make any contradictions in my testimony. And yet... they continue to suspect me?
Hah. What's a couple of pointed fingers when this sword of legends... is resting all snug and sweet in my hands?

A little sacrifice ain't a thing if it's for your own family.
I've been standing by the family with my whole damn heart—my Brothers and Sisters, and even my little girl, shouldn't mind a bit of sacrifice when their turn comes, right? I mean... what is loyalty, if not that?
One, two, three... Tsk. They must be mad to send this chump change to line my pockets. Don't they know I'm still their Great Sister? Should've packed it fat with at least ten fresh, crisp bills.
... Good girl!
Let's see... According to the Special Clause on the House of Spiders...
Goes without reading—of course it's complete and total extermination!
That unsettling noise... Got a bad feeling about this. Don't let your guard down.
Welcome to the kill zone!
Alright, out of phases, or do you have more surprises up your sleeve?
Haha! It's been so long. I'm actually kinda winded!
Game over!
... Won't let you... take my sword. Not ever...
Heh. Why work with your brains when you've got the brawn?
This setback ain't a big deal in the City.

This is quickly spiraling down to a lackluster endgame. I wouldn't have bothered humoring you had I known your strategem was this pathetic.
Let's wrap this up. It's getting boring.
Hahahaha! Having a good time, Kiddo? Mama's the best, huh?

That's one cheap shot of a gimmick! Tsk. Got my hands full right now, so I'll make a note in the Book and come back to it.
Don't think you've gotten away with this.
